mapper.insert: INSERT INTO `groups` (group_name, book_title, headcount_min, headcount_max, content, style, status, end_date, user_id, code_id) VALUES (#{groupName}, #{bookTitle}, #{headcountMin}, #{headcountMax}, #{content}, #{style}, #{status}, #{endDate}, #{userId}, #{codeId})
mapper.select: SELECT group_id, group_name, book_title, headcount_min, headcount_max, content, style, status, end_date, created_at, updated_at, user_id, code_id FROM `groups` WHERE group_id = #{groupId}
